title: viola × ogawae
intro: Viola × ogawae, also known as the Viola hybrid or Japanese viola, is a rare hybrid species of flowering plant that originated from the cross between Viola philippica and Viola collina. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × ogawae include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
